description: The Add to Cart button does nothing when clicked. Clicking 'Add to Cart' on the Products page or Home page does not add the item to the cart; the cart count stays the same and no toast appears.
expectedOutcome: Clicking Add to Cart on a product should add that item to the cart, update the cart count, persist the cart (e.g. in Redux and localStorage), and show a success toast.
hint: Look at useCart.js. The hook is used by Products and HomePage to get addToCart. Verify that the hook returns a function that dispatches the add-to-cart action.
solution:
In src/hooks/useCart.js the useCart hook does not expose addToCart in its return object. Products.jsx and HomePage.jsx destructure addToCart from useCart() and call it when the user clicks Add to Cart; when addToCart is undefined, calling addToCart(payload) throws a TypeError and the flow breaks.

Fix: Add addToCart back to the object returned by useCart, dispatching the addToCartAction with the payload.
